title: callitriche palustris subsp. subanceps
intro: Callitriche palustris subsp. subanceps is a subspecies of aquatic plant, also known as water starwort or marsh starwort, that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Callitriche palustris subsp. subanceps include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies, such as creams and ointments, to treat skin conditions and wounds.
